case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK VS. MICHAEL K DO et al

docket_entries.description: COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK AS TO DEFENDANT DO, MICHAEL K DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          APR-05-2002 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-01-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       MAR-08-2002
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT; OF LOST ORIGINAL AGREEMENT; COSTS(CCP 1033) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-08-2002 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). OSC TO PLAINTIFF'S ATTORNEY JANALIE A. HENRIQUES. THE APR-05-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAY-08-2002 IS OFF CALENDAR JUDGMENT ENTERED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DECLARATION RE: WAIVER OF EXCESS INTEREST AND ATTY FEES FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DO, MICHAEL K $1,655.39 PRINCIPAL, $95.24 INTEREST, $136.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,886.63, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1886.63. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT DO, MICHAEL K
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK SERVED JAN-27-2002, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DO, MICHAEL K
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $136.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT DO, MICHAEL K
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 5
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT DO, MICHAEL K
